Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Table of contents Key to icons FT tears PT tears FT+PT tears Pre-clinical Not applicable (NA)Imaging outcomes Patient outcomes Biopsy Biomechanical Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Product summary: REGENETEN◊ Bioinductive Implant The REGENETEN Implant has a large and growing evidence base in rotator cuff repair.1,2,4–7,9,10,12,14,22–24 By promoting the formation of new tendon-like tissue,1,2,9,24,25 the REGENETEN Implant changes the course of rotator cuff tear progression.2,3,13,24 Collection of Evidence Effective treatment of rotator cuff tears can be challenging. Conventional treatment of PT tears commonly involves removing healthy tissue27 and results in lengthy rehabilitation,28 whilst repair of large FT tears has been associated with re-tear rates >50%.26 i The REGENETEN Implant is resorbed and replaced by tendon-like tissue over 6 months1,5,25* With a substantial body of literature evaluating its use in rotator cuff repair (>10 published clinical studies and >650 patients1,2,4–7,9,10,12,14,22–24†), the REGENETEN Implant has been associated with: †As of July 2024.*On human biopsy (n=1) and in vivo sampling. Significant and clinically meaningful post-operative improvements in clinical outcomes4,8,14 Lower re-tear rates for FT tears versus standard repair techniques7,9,10,22 Low complication rates2,4,5,7–10,12,14,22,23 Rapid post-operative recovery5,13,14,26 5 weeks 6 months Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Collection of Evidence The unique open-architecture design of HEALICOIL Anchors, with threads extending in an open helical form along the anchor, allow access of blood, bone marrow and stem cells to the rotator cuff repair site.15,16 In clinical studies, HEALICOIL Anchors have been shown to aid tendon and bone healing: both increasing tendon thickness and the bone density surrounding the anchor compared with closed anchors.15,16 Suture anchor technology is continually evolving, with the ultimate goal being fixation that withstands rehabilitation, allows for increased healing and decreases failure.16 Open-architecture design allows access of blood, bone marrow and stem cells to the repair site15,16 HEALICOIL Anchors have been found to support tendon and bone healing: Signiﬁcantly increased tendon thickness compared with closed anchors (p=0.0074) 15 6 weeks 6 months Signiﬁcantly greater bone density surrounding the anchor compared with closed anchors (p<0.05) 16 Newly formed bone Newly healed tissue Blood cellsBiologically active marrow elements Stem cells Product summary: HEALICOIL◊ Suture Anchors i Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Product summary: REGENESORB◊ Material REGENESORB Material is composed of a unique formulation of proven materials designed to stimulate bone healing and formation.29-35 The material is absorbed and replaced by bone within 24 months,21,36,37 provides sustained mechanical stability21,36,37 and is not associated with severe osteolysis.21 Collection of Evidence Important features of suture anchors that facilitate their successful use in rotator cuff repair include strong primary stability, short and complication-free resorption characteristics and new bone formation capability.21,40,41 REGENESORB Material: a unique composition of proven materials29-35 *As demonstrated in vivo. Resorbed and replaced by bone faster than another biocomposite*37–39 With a history of established clinical use, REGENESORB Material is associated with: No severe osteolysis21 Resorption and replacement by bone within 24 months21,36,37 Sustained mechanical stability21,36,37 REGENESORB Material 21 Arthrex Biocomposite Material 40 Percentage of anchors 0 20 40 60 80 100 Not visible Partially visible Visible Clearly visible 21 months 28 months 65%15% 20% Cal cium sulfate: W o rk s i n e a rl y h e a l i n g s t a g e s
